data.name: (ツン)デレ少女とイチャラブえっち!! ～快楽を知ってしまった末路はお〇んぽ依存症に～
data.detailed_description:
About

This is a sex simulation that moves smoothly with Live2D.

The girl who used to be tsundere is now completely nerdy around  you...
Eventually, all she can think about is pleasure...

Please enjoy such a situation.

Story Mode

You can experience the state of tsundere girl in three stages.

*State 1 - Virgin
First time having sex with a girl who is not very honest with you...
The tsun element is already almost gone, and she seems to be positive about the favor...
*State 2 - Accustomed
Realizing that the chemistry is excellent...
She is gradually captivated by the rod...
*State 3 - Lewd
She looks forward to sex every day...
She climaxes with a squirt while screaming vulgarly...

Free Mode

You can have sex with a combination of different movements and facial expressions.

Perspective Switching Function

You can switch the distance between you and the girl at any time.
As you approach, she bends over and her boobs droop.

Camera

You can switch between three different camera angles at any time to suit your preference.
Zoom and position adjustments are also available.

data.short_description: This is a sex simulation that moves smoothly with Live2D. "If only there was a tsundere girl like her..." Enjoy sex with such fantasies! There is a story mode that includes her three states and a free mode where you can tinker with the parameters. Her ample breasts sway and jiggle as they move!

英文, 簡體中文, 日文*

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 x64
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
